prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-REMOTERUCKSACKGPKIT-14PC-BLK Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 14pc Remote Adventure 30L Rucksack Gold Panning Kit with Classifier Screens, Black Description: Meet your all in one prospecting adventure kit from ASR Outdoor.

Designed for gold seekers who like to venture into remote terrain. Whether you're an experienced prospector or just getting started, this gold panning kit equips you with the gear you need to find and recover gold, no matter where your journey takes you. Walk or hike to just about any river or creek with essential gold prospecting equipment on your back, where you can immediately start panning for gold, with minimal set up time required.

All gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit, conveniently fits inside the included ASR Outdoor 30L backpack, so you can remain hands free when you’re on the go, and easily pack everything out when you’re done for the day.

Here’s what’s included:

Durable 30L Backpack: Built tough for the backcountry, this spacious pack carries all your gear comfortably with reinforced seams, padded and adjustable shoulder straps, and multiple compartments

Classifier Screens (Multiple Sizes): Speed up your panning process with lightweight, stackable screens that separate larger rocks and debris from finer material, ideal for high efficiency prospecting

Gold Pans: High quality 14 inch single riffle and 12 inch dual riffle gold pans ensure you never miss a flake, whether working in a riverbed or remote stream

8lb Magnetic Pick Up Tool: Remove unwanted magnetic black sand from concentrates quickly, lightweight and perfect for field use

3-in-1 Shovel: Compact yet rugged, this digging tool is ready to tackle any terrain, whether breaking hard ground, scooping gravel or digging into riverbanks

Collapsible Bucket with Stand: Lightweight and portable, this foldable bucket is perfect for collecting water or transporting pay dirt; packs down small to save space.

Fine Gold Recovery Tools: Everything you need to help recover and store even the tiniest specs of gold with ease

Designed for portability and performance, the 14pc Remote Rucksack Gold Panning Kit is your reliable companion for off the grid gold adventures. Whether hiking into remote streams or exploring historic goldfields, you’ll have all the tools needed to pan, classify, recover and store found gold. Good luck! Search Terms: Gold panning kit; gold prospecting equipment; gold rush; gold mining equipment; hand tools; soil sifter; backpack; gold pans; sieve; outdoor gear; camping supplies; gold panning kit for adults; paydirt; sluice box; classifier screen; rucksack Features: - REMOTE GOLD PANNING KIT: Designed for gold seekers who like to venture into remote terrain; this gold panning kit equips you with the essential gold prospecting equipment needed to find and recover gold, no matter where your journey takes you - 30L RUCKSACK: All the gold prospecting equipment included with this gold panning kit fit into the large capacity backpack, meaning you can hike with all your gold prospecting equipment and personal belongings to just about any remote location - CLASSIFIER SCREEN SET: Essential for removing unwanted materials like gravels and rocks from your paydirt to increase gold yield; this set includes three large stacking classifier screens in 1/8 inch, 1/12 and 1/20 inch mesh sizes to be used in conjunction with the collapsible bucket - GOLD PANS: This gold panning kit includes one large 14 inch single riffle gold and one standard size 12 inch dual riffle gold pan; the single riffle gold pan allows for the initial panning of a larger sample, while the dual riffle is great to move to for finishing concentrates - FINE GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS: Included are a pair of tweezers, an 8lb magnetic pick up tool, 3 in 1 shovel, eye loupe and more to help with the extraction and storage of found gold === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 14pc Gold Panning Kit 30L Rucksack Black
